advancements.more_rpg_content.root.descr: Explore the different paths you can choose!
advancements.more_rpg_content.root.title: More RPG Content!
death.attack.mrpgc.fatal_poison.teemo: %1$s stepped on a suspicious green and purple mushroom.
death.attack.mrpgc.molten: %1$s is burned by his molten armor.
effect.more_rpg_classes.arcane_precision: Makes targets more vulnerable to Arcane Spell Damage & Crits
effect.more_rpg_classes.carve.descriptio: Reduces armor and increases damage taken.
effect.more_rpg_classes.collected_soul.d: Increases soul spell power per stack.
effect.more_rpg_classes.duelists_focus_o: Reduces incoming damage by 25% from attackers who are not marked.
effect.more_rpg_classes.duelists_focus_t: Other entities deal reduced damage to the attacker who marked you and you receive increased damage.
effect.more_rpg_classes.fatal_poison.des: Inflicts damage over time, and can kill both undead and non-undead mobs.
effect.more_rpg_classes.frozen_solid.des: Cant move, attack or jump, takes additional damage if hit during active effect.
Reduced Healing and increased incoming damage.
effect.more_rpg_classes.ignited.descript: Burns the target, dealing damage over time and reduces healing. The target cannot move or attack.
effect.more_rpg_classes.molten_armor.des: Reduces armor, armor toughness and damages the target if it wears armor.
effect.more_rpg_classes.sirens_tear.desc: Heals a percentage of max health every second, scaling with missing health.
effect.more_rpg_classes.soaked.descripti: Soaking the target with water extinguishing fire, more vulnerable to frost, lightning and water spells.
effect.more_rpg_classes.stagger.descript: Reduces Armor, Attack Damage & Movement Speed and incapacitates the target.
effect.more_rpg_classes.withers_curse.de: Increases Incoming Damage, the amplifier increases with each harmful status effect.
effect.more_rpg_classes.zephyrs_speed.de: Increasing the Crit Chance & Movement Speed of the caster.
Increases earth and nature spell damage you deal.
enchantment.more_rpg_classes.typhoon.des: Increases air and water spell damage you deal.
item.more_rpg_classes.upgrade_crystal.wa: Earth Wizard and Water Wizard armor
On dealing a critical hit with an active spell, apply a stack of Arcane Precision to the target for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.more_rpg_classes.avalanche_melee.d: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to spawn a small avalanche, dealing {damage} damage and inflicting freezing for {effect_duration}.
spell.more_rpg_classes.burstcrack.descri: Unleashes a shockwave around you, knocking up enemies and dealing physical {damage_1} & {damage_2} arcane-damage.
spell.more_rpg_classes.burstcrack.name: Burstcrack
spell.more_rpg_classes.carve.description: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to stack armor reduction by {bonus2} and increasing incoming damage by {bonus} for {effect_amplifier_cap} times.
spell.more_rpg_classes.carve.name: Carve
spell.more_rpg_classes.cursed_wither_bol: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to inflict wither's curse for {effect_duration} seconds and dealing additional {damage} damage.
spell.more_rpg_classes.decapitate.descri: Delivers a heavy blow with forward momentum that disables shield and item usage of target.
spell.more_rpg_classes.decapitate.name: Decapitate
spell.more_rpg_classes.dragon_breath.des: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to create a dragon breath cloud, dealing {damage} damage per second.
On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to deal extra {damage} to the target damage and heals the user for {heal} health.
spell.more_rpg_classes.dragonslayers_fur: Healing or buffing allies under {threshold} health, grants them increased critical damage by {bonus} for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.more_rpg_classes.duelists_focus.de: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} to mark the target, all other entities deal 25%% reduced damage on you and only you deal 25%% increased damage on your marked target.
spell.more_rpg_classes.elder_guardian_sh: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to inflict bleeding for {effect_duration} seconds and deal {damage} damage.
spell.more_rpg_classes.ender_dragon_shie: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to create an explosive burst dealing {damage} damage to nearby enemies.
spell.more_rpg_classes.glacial_shield.de: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to freeze nearby enemies for {effect_duration} seconds.
Defeating Enemies spawns glacial projectiles that deal {damage} damage and freeze enemies for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.more_rpg_classes.lightning_strike_: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to spawn a lightning strike.
On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to spawn a lightning strike.
spell.more_rpg_classes.obsidian_shards.d: On dealing damage with an active spell, shoot obsidian shards outward in all directions from the target.
spell.more_rpg_classes.puncture.descript: Charges in a designated direction, striking all enemies.
spell.more_rpg_classes.puncture.name: Puncture
spell.more_rpg_classes.pyromaniac.descri: When dealing spell damage to a burning target, reduce fire spell cooldowns and deal bonus damage.
spell.more_rpg_classes.pyromaniac.name: Pyromaniac
spell.more_rpg_classes.reef_arrows.descr: On arrow hit: {trigger_chance} chance to inflict bleeding for {effect_duration} seconds and dealing additional {damage} damage.
spell.more_rpg_classes.reef_arrows.name: Coral Reef Arrows
spell.more_rpg_classes.rimefrost.descrip: When dealing damage with an active frost spell, spawn a freezing cloud at the target.
spell.more_rpg_classes.rimefrost.name: Rimefrost
spell.more_rpg_classes.sirens_tears.desc: On healing: {trigger_chance} chance to remove a harmful effect and apply regeneration that scales with missing health for {effect_duration} seconds.
spell.more_rpg_classes.sirens_tears.name: Siren's Tears
spell.more_rpg_classes.water_flow.descri: When casting a spell, deal water damage and heal nearby allies in a small area.
spell.more_rpg_classes.water_flow.name: Water Flow
spell.more_rpg_classes.waterbomb_melee.d: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} chance to deal {damage} damage around the target.
spell.more_rpg_classes.wither_pulse_mele: On melee hit: {trigger_chance} inflicts targets in a 90 degree radius with Wither and dealing {damage} damage.
spell.more_rpg_classes.wither_shield.des: On shield block: {trigger_chance} chance to shoot 3 wither skulls dealing {damage} damage and inflicting wither.
spell.more_rpg_classes.zephyrs_speed.des: On dealing damage with an active spell, gain a stack of Zephyr's Speed for {effect_duration} seconds. Increasing spell crit chance by {bonus} and movement speed by {bonus2}.
